title: Mr. Pellam
subTitle: Balaji thinks men can do everything as they are supposed to be the head of the family and earn for them. But he realises his mistake when he loses his job and his wife has to work.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Shambu
subTitle: When a goon misbehaves with his lover, a man kills him. However, when a gangster vows to avenge the murder, he finds support in the student community.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Pattabhishekam
subTitle: Vishnu goes to a palace as a fake veterinary doctor in order to earn money and clear his debts. However, he is forced to overcome various obstacles.

title: Dora Bidda
subTitle: Murty's daughter, Lata, falls in love with Gopi, a schoolteacher, and the two decide to get married. However, when Murty kills Gopi, his lookalike, Raju, decides to avenge his death.

title: Vasu
subTitle: Vasu, an aspiring musician, is at odds with his father about his choice of career. Later, he falls for Divya, a young woman, but makes a fool of himself in front of her.

title: Goutham Nanda
subTitle: An emotionless man lives off his father's wealth. He learns a lesson when he runs into a poor man and decides to swap his life with him.

title: Indrasena
subTitle: A man loses his job due to the actions of his twin brother and circumstances further lead him down a dark path, ultimately turning him into a feared don.

title: Bobbili Simham
subTitle: During a boat accident, Rayudu rescues Vijaya instead of his son. Years later, when Vijaya is about to be appointed as the next heir of Bobbili, an evil man challenges Vijaya to a fight.

title: Reporter
subTitle: Thaiyal Nayagi tries to protect her niece from an online predator. However, things escalate when the FBI's attempt to catch the culprit puts them both in danger as they unwittingly become bait.

title: Reporter
subTitle: Thaiyal Nayagi tries to protect her niece from an online predator. However, things escalate when the FBI's attempt to catch the culprit puts them both in danger as they unwittingly become bait.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Gandikota Rahasyam
subTitle: In the Gandikota kingdom, Raja raises his voice against the discrimination of the poor, who are asked to pay double taxes. He decides to teach a lesson to Pratapa, who dreams of becoming a king.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Ammayi Bagundi
subTitle: Siva falls in love with a woman after having a glimpse of her at the bus stop and gets married to her. However, she turns out to be a perfect lookalike.

title: Madhura Meenakshi
subTitle: When Meenakshi, a young devotee, gets tormented by an evil force, Goddess Meenakshi descends to earth to protect her disciple.

title: Darbar
subTitle: Aaditya, a high-ranking law enforcement official, sets out to eradicate the city's gangsters. As the events unfold, it becomes clear that his motivations are deeply personal.

title: Nee Manasu Naaku Telusu
subTitle: Sridhar and Preeti begin to like each other, but part ways without confessing their feelings. Over the years, they search for each other in vain amidst the bustling streets of Chennai.

title: Bobby
subTitle: The daughter of a gangster falls in love with the son of a rich businessman. However, when they realise that their parents are rivals, their dream to get married shatters.

title: Nenunnanu
subTitle: Venu helps an eloped couple, Anu and Arun, marry each other. In Arun's absence, Anu starts living with Venu and Arun's father tells him that his wife is having an affair with another man.

title: 10th Class
subTitle: Childhood sweethearts Srinu and Anjali get married after being together for many years. However, they do not realise that fate has other plans as their lives take an unexpected turn.

title: 10th Class
subTitle: Childhood sweethearts Srinu and Anjali get married after being together for many years. However, they do not realise that fate has other plans as their lives take an unexpected turn.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Tirupathi
subTitle: Tirupathi's pregnant sister dies at the hospital due to the negligence of a doctor who wanted a bribe. Enraged, Tirupathi sets out to seek revenge, but it affects the kin of his close friend.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Dorikithe Dongalu
subTitle: Shoban Babu, a thief, turns into a vigilante after watching the atrocities of fellow criminals around him. Raju, a gangster, vows to kill Shoban.

title: Bagunnaraa
subTitle: A young woman meets a man and falls in love with him but things take a turn when her father learns about their relationship and he plans to separate them.

title: Pellaindi Kaani
subTitle: A woman marries a wealthy widow's son to save her father's life, but complications ensue when the widow's relatives scheme to usurp her fortune.

title: Letha Manasulu
subTitle: Two friends, Raju and Lakshmi, never reveal their love for each other and end up with different life partners. Years later, when Raju and his wife come across Lakshmi, they find that she is a widow.

title: Mahankali
subTitle: When Mahankali, an honest cop, is handed the responsibility of finding the terrorists behind the Hyderabad serial bomb blasts, he becomes friends with one of them to fulfil his mission.

title: Jailer
subTitle: Muthuvel Pandian, a retired prison guard, sets out on a quest for revenge after his son goes missing while investigating a smuggling case.

title: Ante Sundharaniki
subTitle: An interfaith couple spins a web of lies to get their conservative families' approval for marriage, but they themselves end up badly entangled in it.
